identity.tagline: Build better habits, one stack at a time
identity.description: Habit Stack is a cross-platform wellness app that helps busy adults build lasting routines by chaining small daily habits with streak tracking, smart reminders, and weekly insights.

audience.primary: Health-conscious adults aged 25–45 who want to build morning and evening routines without complicated productivity systems.
audience.secondary: People returning to fitness or mindfulness after a break who need a gentle restart.
painPoints: Starting too many habits at once and burning out within two weeks
Existing apps feel like chores instead of small wins
No single place to track routines across phone and desktop

personas.name: Morning Optimizer
personas.summary: Remote professional who wants a 20-minute morning routine before work — hydrate, stretch, journal, plan the day.

personas.name: Comeback Coach
personas.summary: Someone rebuilding consistency after travel or illness. Needs low friction and forgiving streak rules.

style.styleNotes: Warm, encouraging, and calm. Celebrate progress without guilt. Avoid corporate wellness jargon.

mockup.notes: Prototype should demonstrate stack creation, daily check-in, and streak view.

screenshots.title: Your daily stack at a glance
screenshots.description: See every habit in one view and check in with a single tap.

screenshots.title: Track streaks and weekly progress
screenshots.description: Celebrate consistency with streaks and a simple Sunday summary.

screenshots.title: Simple subscription
screenshots.description: 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime from your account settings.

inline.headline: Loved by early testers
inline.body: "Finally an habit app that doesn't make me feel bad for missing a day." — Beta tester, Austin

inline.headline: Simple pricing
inline.subheadline: $6.99/month after a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

inline.headline: Ready to build your first stack?
inline.subheadline: Join thousands forming better routines — one small habit at a time.

seo.title: Habit Stack — Build better habits, one stack at a time
seo.description: Chain small daily habits into lasting routines. Cross-platform, streak tracking, 7-day free trial.

primaryTexts: Stack 3–5 micro-habits and track them in under a minute a day. Try Habit Stack free for 7 days.
Tired of habit apps that feel like chores? Habit Stack makes consistency feel like winning.
Cross-platform habit tracking with streaks and weekly insights. Start your free trial today.
descriptions: iOS, Android, and web. One subscription.

events.name: email_captured
events.description: User submitted email on landing page

experiment.hypothesis: We believe health-conscious adults aged 25–45 will sign up for a free trial at a CPA below $8 because current habit apps feel overwhelming and Habit Stack offers a simpler stacking approach.
successCriteria: Trial start rate above 15% of email signups
Buy Now / Subscribe click rate above 2.5%
At least 200 unique landing page visitors

decisionRules.winnerThreshold: CPA below $8 AND trial start rate above 15% after min sample size reached
decisionRules.killThreshold: CPA above $20 after 50% of budget spent with fewer than 10 email signups
decisionRules.notes: Pause for manual review if CPA is $8–$15 at day 10 with positive engagement but low conversions.

appStore.subtitle: Stack small habits daily
appStore.promotionalText: New: Flex days for travel and rest. Keep your routine without breaking your streak guilt-free.
appStore.description: Habit Stack helps you build lasting routines by chaining small daily habits. Create morning and evening stacks, track completion in under a minute, and watch your consistency grow with streaks and weekly insights. Cross-platform sync across iOS, Android, and web. Start your 7-day free trial today.
